docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GHANDI, JINOUS AKA GINA GHANDI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GHANDI, JINOUS AKA GINA GHANDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND $1,480.08 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,562.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF GHANDI, JINOUS AKA GINA GHANDI ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,476.00 FILED BY GHANDI, JINOUS AKA GINA GHANDI AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND HEARING SET FOR AUG-30-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,673.92 AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GHANDI, JINOUS AKA GINA GHANDI AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND-CATALAN, EDWARD AKA EDWARD MCFARLAND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINTED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2010 - JUDGMENT.

CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET ENCLOSED HEREWITH, CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND NOTICE OF OPPOSITION FILED ON THE EXECUTION-BANK LEVY SERVED ON 7/22/10 TO CHASE BANK. THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE IS CURRENTLY HOLDING $43.46. RECEIVED AND FILED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF SEP-30-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR.

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF AUG-30-2010 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-30-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN 506 IF NO APPEARANCES CONTINUE TO OCTOBER 14, 2010- IF NO APPEARANCES DISCHARGE OEX AND JUDGMENT CREDITOR WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. PER JUDGMENT DEBTOR $580.00 WAS GARNISHED FROM PAYCHECK, SHERIFF DEPARTMENT IS HOLDING $ 43.46 WHICH JUDGMENT CREDITOR STATES SHE HAS NOT RECEIVED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL MAIL COPY OF PAY CHECK STUB TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHOWING GARNISHMENT. JUGMENT DEBTOR STATES HIS NEXT PAYDAY IS 09/10/10 WHICH ANOTHER $580.00 WILL BE GARNISHED AND THEN AGAIN ON 09/24/10.
CONTINUED ORDER (CLAIM OF EXEMPTION) SENT TO DEFENDANT EDWARD MCFARLAND-CATALAN RETURNED."RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS."
